restaurant.name: Harbor Table
restaurant.description: Indoor and poolside spaces available. Prepare your event with us.
restaurant.address: 125 Marina View Drive, San Diego, CA 92101
restaurant.footerNote: Call us for custom packages, group deals, and same-week availability.

categories.name: Dining Experiences
categories.description: Signature spaces designed for relaxed meals, celebrations, and business hosting.

items.name: Indoor Signature Dining
items.description: Climate-controlled luxury seating with curated service and chef-recommended courses.

items.name: Poolside Sunset Service
items.description: Open-air seating by the pool with ambient lighting and premium evening service.

categories.name: Event Hosting
categories.description: From birthdays to receptions, we design memorable events with seamless execution.

items.name: Private Indoor Events
items.description: Dedicated indoor hall with customized decor, audio setup, and coordinated staffing.

items.name: Poolside Celebration Package
items.description: Stylized poolside setup with lighting and custom hospitality flow.

items.name: Full-Service Wedding Reception
items.description: Venue planning, multi-course catering, hospitality team, and timeline management.

items.name: Event Proposal Preparation
items.description: Get a personalized proposal with concept, budget estimate, timeline, and service inclusions.

categories.name: Catering Services
categories.description: Chef-led catering tailored for offices, homes, private villas, and outdoor venues.

items.name: Corporate Lunch Catering
items.description: On-time delivery, balanced menu options, and setup-ready packaging.

items.name: Home Party Catering
items.description: Buffet stations, live grills, and service staff for stress-free hosting.

categories.name: Concierge & Extras
categories.description: Add-on services to elevate your experience from convenient to unforgettable.

items.name: Custom Decor Styling
items.description: Theme-based floral, table styling, and branded welcome setups.

items.name: Live Music Setup
items.description: Acoustic or DJ-ready arrangement with coordinated sound checks.

testimonials.quote: They handled our engagement dinner flawlessly. The proposal process was clear and fast.
testimonials.author: Maya R.

testimonials.quote: From tasting to execution, Harbor Table felt like a true hospitality partner.
testimonials.author: Daniel K.

testimonials.quote: Poolside setup was stunning and the team coordinated every detail perfectly.
testimonials.author: Aisha T.

addons: Live station or signature mocktail bar
venueDetails.cancellationPolicy: Free rescheduling up to 7 days before event date. Cancellations within 72 hours may incur staffing and prep charges.
